jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Lybrate
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
